The policy does not mention physiological data, so it provides no specifics or limits on its collection, indicating a lack of meaningful data minimization for this category.

collected.policy_snippet: voice recordings when you speak to Alexa; images and videos collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services; the location of your device or computer;
collected.purpose: To provide voice, image, and camera services, respond to requests, and improve services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy collects physical data such as voice recordings, images, videos, and location for broad purposes like providing services and personalization, but does not specify concrete limits on the scope or necessity of this collection.

stored.policy_snippet: images and videos collected or stored in connection with Amazon Services;
stored.purpose: For providing services, personalization, and improvement as stated in the purposes.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can choose to automatically delete your voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests to Alexa after a specified period of time (3 or 18 months), or you can choose to not save any voice recordings.
retention_policy.policy_snippet_inactivity: we will delete the voice recordings, text transcripts, and typed requests associated with a chat once the specified period of time has passed since your last request to Alexa within that chat.

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below and with subsidiaries Amazon.com, Inc. controls that either are subject to this Privacy Notice or follow practices at least as protective as those described in this Privacy Notice.
shared.purpose: For transactions involving third parties, third-party service providers, business transfers, and protection of Amazon and others.

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Physical data including voice recordings, images, videos, and location is collected and stored, with sharing to third parties under vague conditions. Deletion policies are specified only for Alexa voice recordings, leaving other physical data retention unclear. International data transfers are indicated through participation in data privacy frameworks.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: To provide, improve, and personalize Amazon Services, including recommendations and troubleshooting.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy describes broad collection of behavioral data such as interaction logs, browsing history, and usage patterns without specifying concrete limits or justifying why each type is necessary.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: To operate, provide, develop, and improve Amazon Services.

shared.policy_snippet: Third-Party Service Providers: ... These third-party service providers have access to personal information needed to perform their functions, but may not use it for other purposes.
shared.purpose: To enable third parties to perform functions such as order fulfillment, marketing, and data analysis.

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Behavioral data is extensively collected, stored, and shared with third parties, including international transfers, without clear deletion policies, increasing risks of profiling and data misuse.
